operator_summary: Replace with a short honest summary of what the live first turn proved or failed to prove.
first_user_turn: Replace with the exact first natural-language turn sent by the human.
first_agent_turn_summary: Replace with a concise summary of the first substantive agent response.

artifacts.transcript_path: Replace with the transcript or notes path for the live run.
artifacts.status_payload_path: Replace with the captured status --json path.
evidence_refs: Replace with additional screenshot or artifact refs as needed.

limitations: Replace with anything the run did not prove.
notes: Copy this file once per runtime and rename to claude_code.live-first-turn.json or opencode.live-first-turn.json.
